description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can with a dark, mottled blue background and a glossy finish. The front features a large, stylized purple cartoon character with a mischievous expression, surrounded by green bubbles and bold, colorful text. The can is labeled with detailed nutritional information, a barcode, and additional branding elements on the sides and back. The main label is vibrant, with orange, green, and white typography, and the can holds 500ml of liquid. The top is sealed with a standard pull tab, and the surface appears clean and free of condensation. The overall design is playful and eye-catching, suitable for urban environments.
description: A tall, glossy blue aluminum can with vibrant cartoon graphics and detailed labeling, sealed with a pull tab. The design is playful and colorful, featuring a purple character and bold text.
description_view_0: The can is shown at an angle, highlighting the barcode, part of the main label, and a portion of the cartoon character.
description_view_1: This view displays the front of the can, showcasing the large purple cartoon character, green bubbles, and the main colorful text.
description_view_2: The side view reveals the detailed nutrition facts and part of the main label, with the can's volume (500ml) visible at the bottom.
description_view_3: The back view focuses on the nutrition facts, barcode, and additional small branding elements, with less emphasis on the main graphic.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a large, stylized purple cartoon character with green bubbles, set against a mottled blue background. Bold, colorful typography in orange, green, and white is used for the main text, with detailed nutritional and product information on the sides.
